## event\_target.once() method

监听单次事件

**Signature:**

```typescript
once<T extends keyof CT, T2 extends (...event_: Parameters<CT[T]>) => void>(type_: T | T[], callback_: T2, target_?: any): typeof callback_ | null;
```

|  Parameter | Type | Description |

|  type\_ | T \| T\[\] | 事件类型 |
